channel.title: 最新限免 / 促销应用
channel.description: GoFans：最新限免 / 促销应用 - Made with love by RSSHub(https://github.com/DIYgod/RSSHub)

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」CALC 聪明
item.description:
原价：¥22.00 -> 现价：¥15.00
平台：iOS
CALC有更智能的方式处理您日常的数学运算，始终使用最新的iOS系统，并由用户的创意赋能。最喜欢的粉丝引语是？“功能和美观可以共存”。 * 苹果在实用工具和计算与转换类别中特色推荐 * 通过全球 7.7k 的评论和超过 100M 次使用验证 * 因其高效的 UI，实时结果和自然的感觉而备受喜爱 * 教育应用商店的教师认证 最新的 iOS 和 watchOS 版本已准备就绪: - iPAD 多任务处理，3D Touch 快捷方式 - 历史记录支持 Spotlight 搜索 - 可扩展计算器小部件带有历史记录 - Apple Watch 本地应用程序，具有触觉反馈 CALC 的十大智能独特功

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」我的画笔专业版MyBrushes Pro–支持中国画,水彩画,素描和书法艺术
item.description:
原价：¥22.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：iOS
限时折扣，原价32元。 MyBrushes Pro 是一款独特的,能够回放整个绘画过程的绘画工具。软件功能强大，仿手绘效果逼真，笔刷工具分为铅笔，毛笔，马克笔，制图笔，水彩笔，油画笔，喷枪等，自定义选择式界面方式，人性化功能设计，绝对是绘画设计爱好者的最佳选择。 • MyBrushes有幸得到中国著名画家向际纯教授的青睐与大力支持，不定期在成都举办MyBrushes画友会，并由向老亲自指点，教导。向教授 系原《科幻世界》美术副编审,四川音乐美术学院客座教授、成都蓝谷电脑艺术学校校长。长期以来，他致力于高等艺术院校的电脑美术教学、理论研究、艺术创作等，曾多次代表中国到美国、日本等国家进行艺术

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」我的画笔专业版 MyBrushes Pro
item.description:
原价：¥22.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：iOS
限时促销,原价30元。 MyBrushes Pro 是一款独特的,能够回放整个绘画过程的绘画工具。软件功能强大，仿手绘效果逼真，笔刷工具分为铅笔，毛笔，马克笔，制图笔，水彩笔，油画笔，喷枪等，自定义选择式界面方式，人性化功能设计，绝对是绘画设计爱好者的最佳选择。 • MyBrushes有幸得到中国著名画家向际纯教授的青睐与大力支持，不定期在成都举办MyBrushes画友会，并由向老亲自指点，教导。向教授 系原《科幻世界》美术副编审,四川音乐美术学院客座教授、成都蓝谷电脑艺术学校校长。长期以来，他致力于高等艺术院校的电脑美术教学、理论研究、艺术创作等，曾多次代表中国到美国、日本等国家进行艺术

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」Camcorder Video Converter
item.description:
原价：¥38.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：macOS
*** 不要错过“超级抠图”，一键抠图工具，从此告别PS的蜗牛抠图。现正半价促销。需要的快下手！*** Camcorder Video Converter,自动从各种AVCHD / MOD / TOD / XDCAM摄录一体机和DV机中导入视频,然后将其转换为各种不同的视频格式,那样可以方便的用iMovie进行视频编辑, 然后共享到 iTunes, iPad, iPhone 和许多其他设备。 1 与各种摄像机高度兼容:如AVCHD / TOD / MOD / XDCAM摄像机或如佳能,松下,索尼,JVC,尼康等DV机 2 完美输出至以下设备: iPad, iPhone, iPod To

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Dato
item.description:
原价：¥68.00 -> 现价：¥38.00
平台：macOS
Dato gives you a local clock, date, multiple world clocks, and upcoming events in the menu bar. When you click Dato in the menu bar, you get a menu with a calendar, calendar events, and world clocks. All of this is highly customizable. It's a one-time purchase with free upgrades forever. Dato will

Create professional Blues tracks to your own chords in minutes with the award-winning SessionBand app - the world’s only chord-based loop app. For Blues musicians and songwriters, this unique app is the ultimate tool for jamming and writing, with full and complete Blues tracks just minutes away! Create studio-quality Acoustic Guitar backing tracks for any song in minutes with the award-winning SessionBand app - the world’s only chord-based loop app. SessionBand Acoustic Guitar is a unique app for songwriters, singers, producers and anyone who wants to quickly create professional Acoustic G

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」SessionBand Jazz 1
item.description:
原价：¥58.00 -> 现价：¥22.00
平台：iOS
Create professional quality Jazz tracks to your own chords in minutes with Volume 1 of the award-winning SessionBand Jazz app - the world’s only chord-based loop app. It's the ultimate Jazz play-along and the perfect tool for Jazz songwriters – wherever you are and whatever your level of ability.

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Cyclop for iPad
item.description:
原价：¥168.00 -> 现价：¥88.00
平台：iOS
Cyclop now available on the iPad – ready to unleash monstrous bass sounds to the mobile world. Cyclop is a monophonic synthesizer. It does one thing very well: delivering cutting-edge digital madness at the low end of the frequency spectrum. Cyclop is the master of subs, beautifully controlling ev

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」WidgeTunes - Music Widgets
item.description:

平台：iOS
Add music Widgets to your Home Screen. Create widgets with your favorites playlists or albums that you can access easily from your Home Screen. With WidgeTunes 2.0 you can create widget profiles so you can add unlimited number of music widgets on the iPhone home screen. On every profile you can add

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Egoist
item.description:
原价：¥198.00 -> 现价：¥98.00
平台：iOS
Egoist is a groove instrument. Load any audio file and squeeze the groove out of it! Try your mp3 library and use it as a sound source! The additional onboard bass, beat and fx units make Egoist the perfect track sketch tool in the studio and on the road. • Audio Unit v3 & Standalone • Quick + Eas

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」时间轴-全球历史
item.description:
原价：¥28.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：iOS
跨越万年，从石器时代到21世纪，重大历史事件一一展现在您面前，更有平行时间轴让您更直观的查看全球历史。 游戏玩累了，剧集追完了，找个时间看看我们世界真实的历史，也许您会发现些不一样的东西。

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Effectrix
item.description:
原价：¥168.00 -> 现价：¥98.00
平台：iOS
Effectrix is a professional multi-effect sequencer for the iPad. The game-changing tool for creative and effective music production is now available on the App Store: scatter 14 intelligent effects across a sequencer matrix and create unheard-of sound patterns and cheeky loop collages. A playful w

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」WOW Filterbox
item.description:
原价：¥148.00 -> 现价：¥58.00
平台：iOS
WOW2 is here! With a future-dripping user interface, 21 incredible filter types with the famous vowel mode. With distortions that cover your tracks with gas and put them on fire. Modulations that cause more trouble than your modular dark room. And finally that warm and juicy sound, that you were loo
